## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy, performance, and new initiatives for Monograph.](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX will deliver an extra week of content to provide buffer during Gary's transition](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [New Reddit content experiment proposed, aiming to boost Geo recognition without changing scope](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [Images/titles to be refined with human-readable versions and pull quotes](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Performance review and glossary/guide content strategy to be explored next week](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)

## Topics

### Content Buffer and Transition

  - [GrowthX to deliver two weeks' worth of content before Gary's departure (next Thursday)](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [Provides buffer for Monograph team during transition](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Chris to take over content review responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)

### Newsletter Integration

  - [HubSpot integration not currently possible due to capacity constraints](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Alternative: Beehive platform supported, but conflicts with Monograph's lead scoring system](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [Gary working on streamlining process for 2-3 months of newsletter content](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)

### Reddit Content Experiment

  - [Proposal: GrowthX to create Reddit content for Monograph at no additional cost](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [Goal: Case study on impact on traffic, clicks, and Geo recognition](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Strategy: 2-5 posts/week, ramping up to 5, using Monograph's company account](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Content buckets: 40% practice management, industry insights, process optimization, problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [Approach: White hat, value-add content answering common A\&E firm questions](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
  - [Formats: Problem-solution and industry insight posts](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)

### Image and Title Refinements

  - [Plan to implement human-readable titles and pull quotes for articles](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Aiming for consistency and quick readability (3-4 words instead of 7-8)](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Override option available for specific title adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)

### Performance Metrics and Content Strategy

  - [ChatGPT remains top referrer (1,600 sessions, up 40%)](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
  - [Perplexity second (300 sessions, up 30%)](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [Top-performing content: guides and glossary-style pieces (e.g., utilization rate guide)](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Exploring glossary/guide content strategy based on high-impact terms](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1961.0)
  - [Considering balance between qualified links and establishing domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=2225.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to deliver additional week of content for review buffer](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [Matthew to share Reddit experiment spec document this week](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Performance report to be prepared for next week's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=2302.0)
  - [GrowthX to draft list of 20 high-impact terms for glossary/guide content](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=2002.0)
  - [Chris to share links on collection period terms and profit breakdown for content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=2274.0)
  - [Explore glossary/guide content strategy based on performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/YxrqjQp57dLCnU8shfiVY6KKus1q44Sa?tab=summary&timestamp=2245.0)
